title: begonia caespitosa
intro: Begonia caespitosa, also known as the "Caucasus Begonia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, and lowering body temperature. In herbal preparations, Begonia caespitosa is often used as a tea or infusion, and has also been used in traditional medicine to make topical creams and ointments to soothe and calm irritated skin.
